steps.title: Use the land-forming clue
steps.content: The sentence says sediments carried by the river eventually form new portions of land. For that to happen, the sediments must gather where the river meets the Gulf of Guinea.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: A would make the sediments disappear, not build land. B concerns speed, not deposition. C applies to living things, not sediment. The needed verb means build up in one place over time. The answer is D.
